title: carex viridula var. pulchella
intro: Carex viridula var. pulchella, also known as the green sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Carex viridula var. pulchella include treating digestive issues, soothing skin irritations, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health ailments.
